title: Master v0.4.8 Feedback Queue Foundation
notes:
Adds the Master Feedback Queue for reviewing and marking feedback reports submitted from Dev.

Changes:
- Adds Feedback Queue card to Master Panel.
- Loads feedback reports from:
  shared-dev/feedback/new
  shared-dev/feedback/seen
  shared-dev/feedback/need-more-info
  shared-dev/feedback/fixed
  shared-dev/feedback/rejected
- Shows feedback report cards.
- Shows full feedback JSON preview.
- Adds review note box.
- Can mark feedback as Seen.
- Can mark feedback as Need More Info.
- Can mark feedback as Fixed.
- Can mark feedback as Rejected.
- Moves feedback JSON into matching status folder.
- Writes Master change history entry.
- Sends Discord webhook alert if enabled.
